scripts.build:apk: npm run build && npx cap sync android && node scripts/gradle-build.mjs assembleDebug && node scripts/zip-backend.mjs
scripts.build:aab: npm run build && npx cap sync android && node scripts/gradle-build.mjs bundleRelease && node scripts/zip-backend.mjs
scripts.build:all: npm run build && npx cap sync android && node scripts/gradle-build.mjs assembleDebug bundleRelease && node scripts/zip-backend.mjs
